# Category: cloud_network_security

parameters:
  vnetName: 'MyVNET' # Define your Virtual Network name here, e.g., MyVNet

- Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks@2019-08-01  # Version number should match the latest published version of resource provider api(s) for ARM template deployment (e.g.: AzureResourceManagerProvider, MarketplaceProvider). Refer to https://docs.microsoft.com/.
